title: HeliX Hybrid Research Sieve
description: Privacy-Safe Research Sieve: local anonymization, cloud heavy-reasoning via DeepInfra, local re-injection with .hlx restore.

anonymizer.role: Privacy filter and PII anonymization mapper

cloud-analyst.role: Stateless cloud reasoning node — receives only sanitized text

reviewer.role: Local re-injection agent and final verified report generator

tasks.prompt: You are a privacy filter. Scan the research document below. Identify all PII entities (person names, organizations, locations). Replace each with a placeholder token ([PERSON_1], [ORG_1], etc.). Output the anonymized text followed by the mapping table. Be precise and complete.

You are an architecture analyst reviewing a technical research document. Analyze the following anonymized text and provide: (1) a summary of the key technical claims, (2) an assessment of the architecture's novelty, (3) open questions for further research. Focus on technical depth and precision.

Restore your previous session state. Consult the anonymization map in hmem and the cloud analysis. Re-inject the real entity names into the cloud synthesis. Generate the final verified research report with proper attribution.
